chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.S–565 of 2025 ________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) ________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.1 to 4 & reply as at Á 2. For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 Mr. Abdul Haleem Jamali, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner and her Husband Mr. K.A. Waswani, AAG Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, APG ASI Naeem Haider on behalf of SHO PS Mirpur Sakro SIP Abdul Hameed Rodhani SHO PS Ghorabari --------------- Through instant Petition, the Petitioner claims following reliefs:- a) Declare that the Petitioner has solemnized marriage with her free will and is entitled to live peacefully with her husband without any harassment or coercion by any person including Respondent No.6’ b) Direct the official Respondents No.1 to 5 to provide protection to the Petitioner, her husband, and his family, and restrain them from harassing or taking any coercive action against them on the basis of false allegations made by Respondent No.6;’ c) Restrain Respondent No.6 from interfering in the Petitioner’s matrimonial life or threatening her and her husband and in-laws; d) Grant any other relief(s) deemed just and proper in the circumstances of the case. Today SHO of police station Ghorabari, present in Court, has filed Reply wherein he has submitted that the mother of the Petitioner Maira Bibi has filed an Application under Section 491, Cr.P.C. before the Court of IInd Additional Sessions Judge Thatta, claiming therein that her minor daughters Sasui and Shaina aged about 14 and 16 years respectively had been kidnapped by the Zainul Abedin, Babar, Zahid, Maria and Shahzado and detained them at unknown place.

Ali Haider Saleem, APG ASI Naeem Haider on behalf of SHO PS Mirpur Sakro SIP Abdul Hameed Rodhani SHO PS Ghorabari --------------- Through instant Petition, the Petitioner claims following reliefs:- a) Declare that the Petitioner has solemnized marriage with her free will and is entitled to live peacefully with her husband without any harassment or coercion by any person including Respondent No.6’ b) Direct the official Respondents No.1 to 5 to provide protection to the Petitioner, her husband, and his family, and restrain them from harassing or taking any coercive action against them on the basis of false allegations made by Respondent No.6;’ c) Restrain Respondent No.6 from interfering in the Petitioner’s matrimonial life or threatening her and her husband and in-laws; d) Grant any other relief(s) deemed just and proper in the circumstances of the case. Today SHO of police station Ghorabari, present in Court, has filed Reply wherein he has submitted that the mother of the Petitioner Maira Bibi has filed an Application under Section 491, Cr.P.C. before the Court of IInd Additional Sessions Judge Thatta, claiming therein that her minor daughters Sasui and Shaina aged about 14 and 16 years respectively had been kidnapped by the Zainul Abedin, Babar, Zahid, Maria and Shahzado and detained them at unknown place. The Court issued notice and matter is now fixed on 24.07.2025. Since the Petitioner has claimed protection from the police officers, the Petitioner No.1 Ms. Maria submits that she has left his house of her parents according to her own freewill and accord and contracted marriage with Babar being sui-juries, which annoyed her parents and such application has been filed against her husband before the 2 Sessions Court Thatta, which prima facie is a counterblast of the action taken by the Petitioner. SHO present in Court is directed to conduct fair inquiry into the allegations of the mother of the Petitioner and submit report before the concerned Court where the matter is pending, however, the Petitioner and her husband shall be provided protection. It is further made clear that in case any harm is caused to the Petitioner and her husband, SHO PS Ghorabari and SSP Thatta shall be held responsible. Record further reflects that SHO PS Ghorabari is not party to the present proceedings, but he stand up before the Court and filed Reply. This reflects his ill intention. ASI Naeem Haider of PS Mirpur Sakro is directed to ensure that the Petitioner and her husband safely reached their home and he shall accompany with them to their destination. It is further made clear that in case any harm is caused to the Petitioner and her husband, then SHO Mirpur Sakro shall also be held responsible. The Petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE FAIZAN/
